Legal & Compliance Framework
Research Use Only Policy

Noor Labs operates strictly within the bounds of applicable federal and state law. All products are sold exclusively as research reagents to qualified scientific professionals. The following legal framework governs all transactions and use of this platform.

01 — RESEARCH USE ONLY
Not for Human or Animal Use
All peptides sold by Noor Labs are designated Research Use Only. This designation means they have not been evaluated by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and are not approved for therapeutic, diagnostic, veterinary, or any in-vivo use. Purchasing does not constitute authorization for human or animal administration under any circumstances.
02 — PURCHASER RESPONSIBILITY
Qualified Researcher Requirement
By completing a purchase, the buyer affirms they are a licensed researcher, scientist, or credentialed laboratory professional with the training, facilities, and legal authorization to handle research-grade peptides. Noor Labs bears no liability for any misuse, misrepresentation, or unauthorized use by the purchaser or any third party.
03 — NO SUPPLY OF ANCILLARY ITEMS
No Water, Needles, or Syringes
Noor Labs does not supply bacteriostatic water, sterile water for injection, reconstitution solution, needles, syringes, or any ancillary injection-related items. The sale of these items would imply encouragement of human administration, which Noor Labs expressly does not advocate, facilitate, or condone.
04 — REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
Jurisdiction & Federal Law
These compounds are sold in compliance with applicable U.S. federal law as unscheduled research chemicals. Regulatory status varies by jurisdiction. Purchasers are solely responsible for ensuring compliance with all local, state, federal, and international laws governing the acquisition, possession, and use of research peptides in their region.
05 — LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
No Warranties or Medical Claims
Noor Labs makes no representations, warranties, or medical claims regarding its products. Information on this site is provided for educational and scientific reference only. Noor Labs expressly disclaims all liability for damages arising from improper use, reliance on research summaries, or use contrary to these stated terms.
06 — ANALYTICAL QUALITY ASSURANCE
Third-Party Tested & Verified
Every compound supplied by Noor Labs undergoes independent third-party analytical testing including HPLC purity analysis and mass spectrometry confirmation. Certificates of Analysis (COAs) are available for each batch, providing documented verification of identity and purity for legitimate research applications.
⚠ FULL LEGAL DISCLAIMER The products sold on this website are intended solely for lawful scientific research by qualified professionals in appropriate laboratory settings. They are not approved by the FDA and are not intended for human consumption, therapeutic application, or diagnostic use. Noor Labs does not manufacture, distribute, or sell any items intended to facilitate human administration of these compounds, including but not limited to reconstitution solvents, needles, or injection supplies. All product descriptions and research summaries are provided for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical advice. How to Order
Add your selected research compound(s) to the cart using the "+" button on each vial, then click the Cart icon in the top right corner to submit your request. Our team will confirm product availability, provide payment instructions via Venmo, and arrange shipment directly to your designated address.
🔬
PRICING NOTICE — BATCH TESTING
Prices are currently higher than usual due to our batch testing process. One vial from each batch is sent out for endotoxin and purity analysis. The cost of this testing is reflected in the price of the remaining vials. A Certificate of Analysis (COA) will be provided for the batch upon completion. We appreciate your understanding — this ensures every compound meets our research-grade standards.

    Tools
    Reconstitution Calculator

    Enter your vial size, desired dose, and BAC water volume to instantly calculate the exact syringe units to draw for your research.

    Research Use of Reconstituted Compounds

    In laboratory settings, researchers commonly reconstitute lyophilized compounds so they can be accurately measured, diluted, stabilized, and analyzed during scientific experiments. Reconstitution allows scientists to study properties such as compound stability, molecular behavior, solubility, degradation rates, purity, and interactions within controlled in vitro environments.

    These research applications may include:
    Cell culture studies
    Receptor binding analysis
    Stability and storage testing
    Laboratory assay development
    Microscopy and biochemical analysis
    Analytical chemistry procedures
    Controlled environmental testing
    Experimental formulation research

    Reconstitution in a research setting does not imply or require human or veterinary administration. The process is a standard laboratory preparation method used to ensure compounds can be consistently handled, observed, and evaluated under scientific conditions.

    All products offered by Noor Labs are intended strictly for laboratory and in vitro research purposes only — not for human consumption, animal use, diagnosis, or treatment.

    Documentation
    COA Transparency & Research Testing Policy
    ⚗ Testing & Transparency

    Every batch we source is independently lab-tested for identity and purity. One vial per batch is sent out for analysis — that testing cost is reflected in the price of the remaining vials.

    COAs are in progress and will be posted as they are completed.

    📦
    Packaging & Quantities

    We do not sell full 10-vial kits. Our products are offered individually, in sets of 3 vials, or in sets of 6 vials only.

    🔬
    Standard Testing

    Standard purity and identity testing can be provided upon request for research purposes. Additional analytical testing such as endotoxin screening, heavy metals analysis, or residual solvent testing significantly increases laboratory expenses and may increase the final price per vial or batch.

    Customers who prefer independent verification may also submit their own sample to any analytical laboratory of their choosing after purchase.

    ⚡ Complimentary & Optional Testing Services

    Finnrick currently offers one complimentary peptide purity analysis submission per month; however, the submitted vial is consumed during testing and cannot be returned.

    Legal
    Terms & Agreements

    LAST UPDATED: MAY 2026 · NOORLABS.IT.COM

    1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS

    By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, exit immediately. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

    2. RESEARCH USE ONLY

    All products are strictly for in-vitro research and laboratory use only. NOT intended for human consumption, therapeutic use, veterinary use, or any purpose outside licensed scientific research in a controlled laboratory environment.

    3. PURCHASER ELIGIBILITY

    You must be at least 21 years of age and a qualified researcher, scientist, or licensed laboratory professional with the legal authority, expertise, and proper facilities to handle research peptides safely.

    4. REGULATORY COMPLIANCE

    You are solely responsible for compliance with all applicable local, state, federal, and international laws governing the purchase, possession, storage, handling, and use of research chemicals. Noor Labs makes no representation that its products are legal in any specific jurisdiction.

    5. NO MEDICAL CLAIMS

    Noor Labs makes no medical claims. Products have not been evaluated by the FDA or any other regulatory authority. Information provided is purely for research and educational reference and does not constitute medical advice.

    6. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

    Noor Labs shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or misuse of our products. Use outside of lawful research settings is strictly prohibited and done at the user's sole risk.

    7. PRIVACY POLICY

    We collect minimal data necessary to process orders. We do not sell or share personal information with third parties outside of order fulfillment. All data is handled in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

    8. SHIPPING & RETURNS

    All sales are final due to the nature of research compounds. Damaged or incorrect items will be replaced upon verification. Noor Labs is not responsible for delays caused by customs, carriers, or regulatory inspection.

    9. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

    All content on this website including text, graphics, logos, and compound information is the intellectual property of Noor Labs. Unauthorized reproduction or distribution is strictly prohibited.

    10. CHANGES TO TERMS

    Noor Labs reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
